title: Painting, Coating, and Decorating Workers
description: Paint, coat, or decorate articles, such as furniture, glass, plateware, pottery, jewelry, toys, books, or leather.

tasks.text: Apply coatings, such as paint, ink, or lacquer, to protect or decorate workpiece surfaces, using spray guns, pens, or brushes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine finished surfaces of workpieces to verify conformance to specifications and retouch any defective areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and maintain tools and equipment, using solvents, brushes, and rags.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read job orders and inspect workpieces to determine work procedures and materials required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Select and mix ingredients to prepare coating substances according to specifications, using paddles or mechanical mixers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place coated workpieces in ovens or dryers for specified times to dry or harden finishes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean surfaces of workpieces in preparation for coating, using cleaning fluids, solvents, brushes, scrapers, steam, sandpaper, or cloth.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conceal blemishes in workpieces, such as nicks and dents, using fillers such as putty.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rinse, drain, or wipe coated workpieces to remove excess coating material or to facilitate setting of finish coats on workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
